home.heroLead: A free space to give visibility to human rights, social injustice, art, music, and safe AI. What was crossed out, here gets uncovered.
home.empty: No posts in this category yet.

submit.title: Share a story
submit.intro: Your submission is reviewed before it goes live.
submit.mustLogin: You need to sign in to publish.
submit.coverImageHint: Upload a file (PNG/JPG/WebP/GIF, max 5 MB) or paste a URL. Optional.
submit.success: Received! Your submission is under review.

formatos.libIntro: Reviewed templates for social aid and human rights paperwork. Fill them in and generate your document — free, no sign-up.
formatos.builderIntro: Define the fields people will fill. It's reviewed before going live.
formatos.mustLogin: You need to sign in to contribute a template.
formatos.fPdfHint: The original people can download. The filled version is generated separately.
formatos.success: Received! Your template is under review.
formatos.disclaimerDefault: This document is for guidance only and does not replace professional advice.

login.title: Sign in
login.intro: We'll email you a magic link. No passwords.
login.sent: Check your email. We sent you a link to sign in.
login.devHint: In local dev, open the mailbox:
login.error: Couldn't send the link. Try again.
